text:
AoTs3-PF1 is the 1st track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 3 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

"AoTs3" is an abbreviation of "Attack on Titan Season 3". Pf is an abbreviation of Piano/Pianoforte, which means that this is "Piano piece 1".

Musical motifs

The track is a piano arrangement of [[2An|SymphonicSuite[AoT]Part2-4th:2An]].

All occurrences

Episode 53 - Erwin tells Levi how much he wants to find what is in the basement
